xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: 11, G.I.D.C., Vapi, Dist Valsad, Gujarat, Pin 396 195.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: Uniphos House, C.D. Marg, 11th Road, Khar (West), Mumbai – 400 052.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Dividend from investment in equity shares and mutual funds and and interest on bank fixed deposits
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: Various customers who are engaged in the chemicals and agro commodities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForGrievanceRedressPoli: Company has Whistle Blower Policy where employees and others may lodge their grievances through Mail ID provided in the said Policy mechanism http://uelonline.com/policies/UEL_ WHISTLEBLOWER_POLICY.pdf WHISTLEBLOWER_POLICY.pdf

Yes The Company does not have a written policy in place, owever the grievance redressal mechanism forms part of the Corporate Governance Framework of the Company The Company has a constituted Stakeholders Relationship Committee to redress investor grievances A report on investor grievances is also placed at the meeting of the Board of Director s every quarter Shareholders can send any grievances concerns on the dedicated email id uel.investors@upl-ltd.com or can raise grievance through SEBI scores

Company has Whistle Blower Policy where employees and others may lodge their grievances through Mail ID provided in the said Policy mechanism. http://uelonline.com/policies/UEL_ WHISTLEBLOWER_POLICY.pdf

Company has Whistle Blower Policy where employees and others may lodge their grievances through Mail ID provided in the said Policy mechanism http://uelonline.com/policies/UEL_ WHISTLEBLOWER_POLICY.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: ESG and regulatory compliance risk is linked to non-adherence with standards and guidelines of all regulatory agencies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Improved business practices and Governance with a focus on complete compliance
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: Refer to Director’s Message at the beginning of this Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Mrs. Sandra Rajnikant Shroff, Managing Director of the Company DIN: 00189012
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: During the year, the Board of Directors and KMPs of the Company devoted their time on various updates pertaining to the business, economy, regulations, ESG, etc.
During the year, the Board of Directors and KMPs of the Company devoted their time on various updates pertaining to the business, economy, regulations, ESG, etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: The Company follow an open door approach. Any employee having issues with related to work may contact Managing Director freely
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Due to the nature of the operations of the Company, there are no critical occupational health and safety risks
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The Company has prepared Standard Operating Procedure to ensure a safe and healthy work place
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: There were no safety related incidents or significant risks/concerns related to health and safety.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The Company identified group of stakeholders based on those group who are impacted by the Company’s business as well as those groups who have major impact on the business of the Company. The Key groups identified are as given under in table 2
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Website of the Company/ and Stock Exchanges/ Grievance mechanism/ Newspaper Publications or announcements/ General Meetings.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherFrequencyOfEngag: Annually/ Half Yearly/ Quarterly and event based
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Communicating the business and financial performance and overall strategy of the Company. Seeking their feedback and expectation of shareholders from the management of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: One-to-one Meeting / Grievance mechanism/ Training Programs
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: To communicate the performance and strategy of the Company. For building a safe, diverse and inclusive working environment. To seek their feedback & suggestions on the work culture.
Promote Transparent Communication with regulator to meet compliance obligations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: Yes, we maintain zero tolerance towards discrimination and harassment of any kind, based on race, religion, colour, age, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, nationality, disability or any other classification as mandated by local laws.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: The Company has framed Whistle Blower Policy to prevent adverse consequences to the complainant in discrimination and harassment cases.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The Company has dedicated Email Id to receive and redress the grievances of the community
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: The Consumers can reach out directly to the management with their feedback and Complaints if any
